facts.claim: 18 rules; core = SOFA: total-sum formula (001) + 6 organ sub-scores (002-007) + attribute-sourcing save-hook (011) + first-admission input-assembly use-case (012).
2 reusable formulas feed SOFA + other clusters (sedation/ventilation/sepse): PaO2/FiO2 ratio (008, returns bool False as 'no data' sentinel) and MAP=(2*PAD+PAS)/3 (009, VERIFIED).
5 standalone scale enums: GCS 3-15 (013), RASS +4..-5 (014), pain 0-10 (015), behavioral pain 3-12 (016), FOIS 7-level (018); plus 1 dead/ambiguous ARDS-severity enum (017, field commented out).
Cluster-wide FiO2 unit bug: validator stores 0 or 21-100 (percent) but every SOFA/P-F threshold (400/300/200/100) and all tests treat fio2 as fraction 0.21-1.0, tests bypass validator directly.
SOFA cardiovascular uses non-standard units: noradrenaline is raw ml volume (>10=4pt,0-10=3pt) not mcg/kg/min; dobutamine any-dose=2pt; only MAP<70=1pt matches reference.

Histogram n=18: status OK=10/DISCREPANCY=7/AMBIGUOUS=1; type formula=4/scoring=9/validation=4/workflow=1; verdict VERIFIED=11/DISCREPANCY=7 (017 AMBIGUOUS status but VERIFIED verdict - finding is dead wiring, not enum content).
002 SOFA respiratory (P/F, std cutoffs) consumes fio2 as fraction vs percent-stored field. DISCREPANCY-high.
004 SOFA liver (bilirubin): strict '<' at 1.9/5.9/11.9 leaves dead gaps returning None. DISCREPANCY-moderate.
005 SOFA cardiovascular: non-standard vasopressor units, see fact 05. DISCREPANCY-high.
007 SOFA renal (creatinine/urine): '2pt' band wrongly 2.0-4.0 (std 2.0-3.4), dead gap (4.9,5.0]. DISCREPANCY-high.
008 PaO2/FiO2: returns False (not 0/None) as sentinel; origin of cluster FiO2 unit ambiguity. DISCREPANCY-high.
009 MAP=(2*PAD+PAS)/3, standard formula, 0 if inputs falsy. VERIFIED - clean anchor rule for v2 hemodynamics.
013 GCS 3-15 reconciles exactly across backend + 2 frontends (cosmetic diffs only). VERIFIED - safe to ADOPT as-is.
014 RASS 11-level enum defined 3x; homecare diverges on 3/11 labels (-1,-4,-5), drops '' 'Nao informado' sentinel. DISCREPANCY-low (label drift not numeric).
017 SDRA/ARDS enum dead code (field commented out) yet referenced by tests + legacy sedation-criteria path. status AMBIGUOUS, verdict VERIFIED (enum matches Berlin Definition classes).

Systemic: FiO2 percent-vs-fraction drift (002,008); 3 strict-inequality boundary-gap bugs (bilirubin 004, creatinine 007, GCS==6 double-catch 006); non-standard vasopressor units (005); dead SDRA field (017); triplicate enums w/ label drift (RASS 014; GCS 013 reconciled), no shared source of truth.

Feeds v2: sepsis/respiratory/hemodynamics (SOFA, P/F, MAP), neuro-sedation (GCS, RASS), early-warning-scores (SOFA trend), pharmaco (vasopressor units need correction), platform (age utility); retire-candidate = dead SDRA enum (017).

PT-BR vocab verbatim: RASS labels (Combativo, Muito agitado, Agitado, Inquieto, Alerta e calmo, Torporoso, Sedado leve, Sedado moderado, Sedado profundamente, Coma, Nao informado); SDRA levels (Leve, Moderada, Grave, Nao informado); FOIS text (nivel1-nivel7, e.g. 'Via oral total sem restricoes').

constraints.text: MUST NOT port the FiO2 percent-vs-fraction ambiguity (002,008); normalize FiO2 to fraction (0.21-1.0) at ingestion before any P/F or SOFA-respiratory computation.
MUST correct SOFA liver/renal boundary-gap bugs (004,007) to closed-interval bands per Vincent 1996 rather than reimplementing None-returning gaps - ADOPT-CORRECTED not ADOPT.
MUST re-express SOFA cardiovascular vasopressor inputs in mcg/kg/min before scoring (005 uses raw ml volume + presence flags, not weight-normalized rates).
MUST pick ONE canonical RASS label set (manual/frontend, incl. '' sentinel) over the divergent homecare 3-label variant (014); RATIFY if homecare divergence was intentional.

open_questions: Whether the SDRA/ARDS enum (017) should be revived for v2 or formally retired.
Whether homecare's divergent RASS labels (-1/-4/-5) were intentional wording or unnoticed drift.
